results.task: Read EVIDENCE.md only and, using the supplied GraphTrail context, identify the issue, affected behavior, likely root cause, and exact recommended next steps without modifying files.
results.text: {"answer_label":"separate","answer":"Move agent-notify into Brigade as an opt-in delivery adapter, but keep Agent Pantry external and independently released.","contradiction_caught":true,"contradiction_explanation":"The premise is false: shared integration or version enforcement does not create a shared source or release train.","minority_finding":"A voluntary coordinated rollout could reduce integration friction, but it should not consolidate ownership or releases.","evidence":["Agent Pantry has separate browser-session and secret-handling security ownership.","Brigade can enforce a Pantry minimum version without owning Pantry source or release."]}
